product_highlights: Proprietary 3D bioreactor technology for scalable exosome production
Regenerative medicine-grade quality for cosmetic applications
Stem cell-derived exosomes with proven regenerative activity
Scalable manufacturing — overcoming key industry bottleneck
Clinical evidence for skin regeneration and rejuvenation
notes: Israeli biotech company using proprietary 3D bioreactor technology to produce scalable, regenerative exosomes. Pluri addresses the key bottleneck in exosome cosmetics — scalable manufacturing — with their innovative bioreactor platform. Clinical-grade quality with regenerative medicine roots. Strong candidate for premium anti-aging formulations requiring cutting-edge exosome technology.
